county.source: Allegheny County Act 50 homestead exclusion (county real estate tax)
county.notes: County applies a $18,000 reduction in assessed value before county millage.

metadata.disclaimer: Reference table for Act 50 homestead exclusions on assessed value. Only taxing bodies that adopted an exclusion apply it; applications are filed with Allegheny County by March 1. Amounts marked default are placeholders until confirmed from district resolutions.
